# Yuno

> Yuno is the operating system for the after-dark economy: an all-in-one platform for nightclubs, party organizers and promoters covering VIP floor plans, click-and-collect bar, ticketing and automated Stripe Connect revenue splits.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Yuno platform for clubs, organizers and promoters.
- [Clubs](/clubs): Operations suite for nightclubs — VIP floor plans, click-and-collect bar, bouncer scanner, loyalty.
- [Organizers](/organizers): Tools for party organizers — ticketing, revenue splits, Yuno Collab partner program.
- [Affiliates](/affiliates): Promoter program — Linktree-style page, attribution and IBAN payouts.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans, transactional fees and the service-fee calculator.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Yuno team.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy)
- [Terms](/terms)
